Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import llama_cpp
import llama_cpp.llama_cpp as lc
print\('lib base path:', lc._base_path\)
print\('lib path:', lc._lib._name if hasattr\(lc._lib, '_name'\) else type\(lc._lib\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
with open\('.venv/Lib/site-packages/llama_cpp/lib/llama.dll', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)
idx = data.find\(b'gemma4'\)
print\(f'gemma4 found at offset: {idx}'\)
if idx >= 0:
    print\(repr\(data[max\(0,idx-10\):idx+30]\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
with open\('models/gemma-4-E2B-it-Q4_K_M.gguf', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(16\)
print\('header:', data.hex\(\)\)
with open\('dist/cuda/models/gemma-4-E2B-it-Q4_K_M.gguf', 'rb'\) as f:
    data2 = f.read\(16\)
print\('dist header:', data2.hex\(\)\)
print\('same?', data == data2\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import llama_cpp
print\('version:', llama_cpp.__version__\)
try:
    l = llama_cpp.Llama\('models/gemma-4-E2B-it-Q4_K_M.gguf', n_gpu_layers=0, verbose=False\)
    print\('loaded ok'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('FAIL:', e\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
content = open\('buildscripts/install-deps.bat', 'rb'\).read\(\)
if b'\\r\\n' not in content:
    content = content.replace\(b'\\n', b'\\r\\n'\)
    open\('buildscripts/install-deps.bat', 'wb'\).write\(content\)
    print\('converted to CRLF'\)
else:
    print\('already CRLF'\)
")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import llama_cpp
print\('version:', llama_cpp.__version__\)
try:
    l = llama_cpp.Llama\('models/gemma-4-E2B-it-Q4_K_M.gguf', n_gpu_layers=-1, verbose=False\)
    print\('loaded ok, CUDA:', bool\(llama_cpp.llama_cpp.ggml_cuda_loaded\(\)\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('FAIL:', e\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
with open\('.venv/Lib/site-packages/llama_cpp/lib/llama.dll', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)
idx = data.find\(b'CUDA'\)
print\('CUDA in llama.dll:', idx >= 0\)
idx2 = data.find\(b'ggml_cuda'\)
print\('ggml_cuda in llama.dll:', idx2 >= 0\)
idx3 = data.find\(b'NVIDIA'\)
print\('NVIDIA in llama.dll:', idx3 >= 0\)
idx4 = data.find\(b'gemma4'\)
print\('gemma4 in llama.dll:', idx4 >= 0\)
" 2>&1)
